```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Extract AI orchestration tools to shared-tools."""

import shutil
from pathlib import Path

WORKSPACE = Path('/media/sunil-kr/workspace/user-projects')
SOURCE = WORKSPACE / 'archive/ai-orchestra'
TARGET = WORKSPACE / 'shared-tools/nested-shares/ai'

ORCHESTRATION_TOOLS = [
    'ai_orchestra/ai_orchestra.py',
    'ai_orchestra/enhanced_orchestra.py',
    'ai_orchestra/ai_autoconfig.py',
    'ai_orchestra/auto_restructure.py',
    'orchestra_cli.py',
    'auto_context_manager.py',
    'context_reset_mitigation.py',
    'universal_context_guard.py',
    'feedback_learning_engine.py',
    'strategic_expansion_manager.py',
    'data_persistence.py',
]

def extract():
    TARGET.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    extracted = []
    
    for tool_path in ORCHESTRATION_TOOLS:
        src = SOURCE / tool_path
        if not src.exists():
            print(f"  ⏭  Skip (not found): {tool_path}")
            continue
        
        target_name = src.name
        target = TARGET / target_name
        
        if target.exists():
            print(f"  ⏭  Skip (exists): {target_name}")
            continue
        
        shutil.copy2(src, target)
        extracted.append(target_name)
        print(f"  ✓ {target_name}")
    
    print(f"\n✅ Extracted {len(extracted)} AI orchestration tools")
    return extracted

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print("🎼 Extracting AI orchestration tools...\n")
    extract()

```
